title: dflash model card sidecar
description: Sidecar JSON carrying per-model defaults transcribed from the upstream model card. Read by dflash_server at startup to set --default-max-tokens, --think-max-tokens, sampler, and reasoning.effort tier values. See docs/specs/thinking-budget.md §3.3 for the full field reference.

name.description: Display name. Informational; the filename is what matters for lookup.

source.description: URL of the upstream model card we transcribed.

verified_at.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) the values were last checked against the source.

max_tokens.description: The card's standard recommended combined cap. Drives default_max_tokens.

download_urls.description: Optional. Map of variant tag (e.g. Q4_K_M, bf16) to GGUF download URL. Used by deployment tooling to resolve a sidecar to a concrete artifact.

complex_problem_max_tokens.description: Optional. Card's recommendation for hard reasoning / benchmark workloads. Drives x-high and max effort tiers.

hard_limit_reply_budget.description: Optional. Tokens reserved post-`</think>` for the visible answer phase. Default 512 (terse-style models like DeepSeek-V4-flash, ds4_eval.c reference). Bump for verbose models that restate work after force-close (Qwen3.6 wants ~2k-4k). When set, drives both `think_max_tokens = max_tokens - hard_limit_reply_budget` and the force-close trigger in do_ar_decode.

soft_limit_reply_budget.description: Optional. Soft-limit negotiated close window (spec §5.3). When `(n_gen - generated)` falls into the range (hard_limit_reply_budget, soft_limit_reply_budget], the AR decode loop peeks the next-token logits — if `</think>` is in the top-`soft_limit_close_rank` candidates, accept it as a natural close (close_kind="soft"). Lets the model self-close gracefully before the hard override fires. 0 disables (hard-only behavior, default).

soft_limit_close_rank.description: Optional. Top-K cutoff for the soft-limit close peek. Default 8 (per ds4_eval.c:3050). Tighter = stricter (close has to be more strongly favored); looser = more cases negotiate a soft close.

thinking_preamble.description: Optional. Template string injected into the prompt right after the opening `<think>` tag when the request opted into thinking. Tells the model what its effective per-request `think_max` and `reply_max` budgets are so it can self-plan rather than being silently force-closed mid-thought. Supports `{think_max}` and `{reply_max}` substitution placeholders. Empty = no preamble (default). For Qwen3.6 the recommended template is an HTML-style comment so the directive is visible to the model but not parsed as content.

thinking_preamble_format.description: Optional. Rendering format hint for `thinking_preamble`. `comment` = HTML-style `<!-- ... -->` (default for Qwen3.6); `directive` = plain text directive; `none` = no preamble even if `thinking_preamble` is set. Reserved for future per-model rendering variants — current implementation emits `thinking_preamble` literally regardless of this hint.

sampling.description: Optional. Recommended sampler defaults; used when the request omits a field.

reasoning_effort_tiers.description: Optional. Explicit per-tier phase-1 budgets. Overrides any computed default. Use when ratio-based defaults don't fit the model.

notes.description: Optional. Free-form notes about provenance, caveats, or non-card-derived choices.
